role: This directory contains unit tests for rendering components within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively, these tests validate that renderers produce correct Mermaid diagrams from architectural specs, generate properly structured markdown documentation with locale support, and output formatted risk-hotspot and public-surface tables.

children.role: Vitest test suite for the ArchitectureDiagramRenderer module, verifying correct Mermaid diagram generation from ArchDiagramSpec inputs.
Unit test suite for the DocumentationRenderer class and rendering helper functions.
Unit test suite for the ViewRenderer module, validating rendering of risk-hotspots and public-surface markdown outputs.
